name.value: What can I do now in OSRS?
Scapestack checks your active account automatically. One scan keeps finished progress out and can bring your bank into the next plan.

value.value: Scapestack checks your active account automatically. One scan keeps finished progress out and can bring your bank into the next plan.

name.value: Update to v0.3.0 in RuneLite, restart RuneLite, then press Sync now.
